description: The planetary astronomy team needs astrometric follow-up for three dwarf planets (Eris, Makemake, and Haumea) to refine their orbital parameters. Using the March 10, 2026 coordinates from ~/Documents/tno_ephemeris_2026.txt, capture three 120-second exposures for each target using the Slot 1 (Luminance) filter. Save the images to /home/ga/Images/tno_recovery/[TargetName]/. For Makemake, also capture a 0.5-degree field-of-view sky survey image using `bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh /home/ga/Images/tno_recovery/makemake_field.png 0.5 --palette cool`. Record the observation date (2026-03-10), target list, and coordinates used in a summary report at ~/Documents/tno_recovery_report.txt.
